text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before we know it, it's already the final evening
of summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm wrapping up strategies for the upcoming
Kikuka Sho, I take a look outside the window.
choice_data_list: The stars are really visible tonight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I let my eyes gaze across the night sky, and a
thought crosses my mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's right. Tonight is...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Phew... Ayabe! Sorry to have kept you waiting!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's fine... I wasn't waiting long.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You probably got cornered by some other
classmates, right?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's you after all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, you guessed right. I had to handle a small
favor...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, let's hurry! It'll be lights-out before we
know it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure you want to go partner running with
me... on the last night of summer camp?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You already improved so much during our time
here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... Well, sure I have. But you could think of this as me gauging your improvement.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Besides... I really do want to run with you. So let's
go!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: If I have to say it, I've been itching to do this!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Itching?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. After the Derby, I've been really pushing
myself in training!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I want to see if I can catch up with you. I want to
measure how far I can go.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I've been itching to test my skills against you!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huh? H-hey, Ayabe! What are you smiling for?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Nothing. You just talk like a child
sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Heeey! I mean, we're not technically adults yet
either, are we?

Haaah ha ha ha! I thought I heard the sound of
cheerful chatter!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Th-that voice!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe and Top Road! You need not explain
yourselves. Evidently, you desire to take part...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In the Overlord's parade to illuminate the night
sky!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-whoa! Opera O's making the fields sparkle
with light!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Opera O and Doto are having fun like
always.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If it's a comedy you desire, I shall provide! Come,
Top Road! Tarry not and join the line.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
When we march, you must chant—OVERLORD!
OVERLORD! O-VER, OVERLOOORD!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
OVERLORD! OVERLORD! OVER, OVER! Lord,
lord...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eek?! I-I messed it up!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Count me out.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do not be shy, Ayabe! You are more than
capable, which is why I called upon you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
While it is I, the Overlord, who shall wipe away all
shadows from the world, you have earned the
right to stand by my side—an ally to my splendor
that lights even the moonless night!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's wrong, Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega hurriedly scans the night sky,
ignoring the confused faces of T.M. Opera O and
the others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Stars of all sizes shine and flicker so brightly, one
could seemingly burn their retinas from looking
too long.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But the moon—it's nowhere to be seen.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm coming to talk, on this night of the
new moon.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's something I've always done, even before I
knew about you.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Now it's my custom, a tradition I've never broken
since learning what I lost.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (No, no, no—this can't be.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Did I... forget?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Huh?! Ayabe? Ayabeee!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: A-and there she goes. I wonder what's wrong...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: She l-looked a little pale...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The shadow of the Grim Reaper.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it was chasing her. No... She may have
summoned it herself.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A-are you s-saying... Ayabe might have some
strange spirit following her?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-then, we have to go after her! It's almost
lights-out—it's dangerous to go out alone!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Stop. You mustn't follow her into the darkness.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We must wait in the light. You understand, right,
Doto?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-Opera O... I understand...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(I have to get to higher ground... closer to the
stars!)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Closer to my sister... I have to hurry!)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...When did this start?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (It's still... hot.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(My throat, my chest... it feels like they're
burning.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Is this the same heat I felt during my debut race? Is this... your heat?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
How much faster will she get by the time the
Derby comes around?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Will our next race be even better than—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Since when did I...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
After all, I want everyone to compete with
everything they've got—including me!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Compete... with everything I've got...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Since when did I forget my sins—my duty?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Since when did I forget my whole purpose for
being alive?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I look forward to running with you today!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Let's give it our best shot.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I started running for my own satisfaction, out of
my own desire, for my own pleasure...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: For myself!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: How dare I live... for myself.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm s—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry!
Ayabe...
Ayabe, what's wrong?
